reflection_ops.description: Non-injected reflection notes for later human review. Use an empty array when there is no reflection to write.

scope.description: Use global for broad Sili behavior or source for the current channel or DM/group chat.

kind.description: Short category such as user_correction, style_preference, workflow_lesson, failure_pattern, policy_candidate, skill_candidate, code_candidate, or hypothesis.

suggested_target.description: Human review target such as AGENTS.md, references/reply/system.md, skill, code, or none.

content.description: The reflection, written as an interpretation, lesson, hypothesis, or improvement candidate rather than an event summary.
